rootCause: The shared _helm-oci-deploy helper stopped after helm upgrade/install and did not run kubectl rollout status checks, so operators had no live progress output and could not confidently know when workload rollout finished.
resolution: Added rollout-status verification and progress logging to _helm-oci-deploy (deploy/statefulset/daemonset targets by Helm release label with deploy-name fallback), plus regression coverage using a fake OCI registry fixture and stubbed helm/kubectl commands.
references: just helm-oci-install release=dspace namespace=dspace chart=oci://registry.test/charts/dspace values=docs/examples/dspace.values.dev.yaml,docs/examples/dspace.values.staging.yaml version_file=docs/apps/dspace.version default_tag=v3-latest
